name: Slide Treasures: Lydia's Hunt
short_description: Set sail to discover treasures and mysteries in an engaging and intriguing story in this casual puzzler.
detailed_description:
Slide Treasures: Lydia's Hunt is a casual sliding puzzle game wrapped in an intriguing story.

Follow Lydia, a cunning and rebellious young woman, on her adventure outside her small town in search of treasures and mysteries. Assemble sliding puzzles, overcome challenges and watch the story unfold.

  • Captivating story with beautiful drawings and characters.
  • Increasingly challenging sliding puzzles.
  • Acquire upgrades and get help with puzzles.
